zh.lifeSummary: 當Guillaume IV DE LA GUERCHE於1215年出生在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉拉 蓋-德-布利塔尼時，他的父親Guillaume De la Guerche De Pouancé III22歲，母親Hersende de Sille- le- Guillaume25歲。他於大約1240年與Anne de Montmorency結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1271年在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易澤格雷普瓦瑟享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guillaume IV DE LA GUERCHE于1215年出生在法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉拉 蓋-德-布利塔尼时，他的父亲Guillaume De la Guerche De Pouancé III22岁，母亲Hersende de Sille- le- Guillaume25岁。他于大约1240年与Anne de Montmorency结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1271年在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易澤格雷普瓦瑟享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: DE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: LA
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Guillaume
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: IV
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Vivian   and   Vivien .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Guillaume IV DE LA GUERCHE was born in 1215, in La Guerche-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France, his father, Guillaume De la Guerche De Pouancé III, was 22 and his mother, Hersende de Sille- le- Guillaume, was 25. He married Anne de Montmorency about 1240. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1271, in Pouancé, Segré, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guillaume IV DE LA GUERCHE est né en 1215, à La Guerche-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France, son père, Guillaume De la Guerche De Pouancé III, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Hersende de Sille- le- Guillaume, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Anne de Montmorency environ 1240. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1271, à Pouancé, Segré, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France, à l’âge de 56 ans.

Er hat um 1240 Anne de Montmorency geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1271 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Pouancé, Segré, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich.

ko.lifeSummary: Guillaume IV DE LA GUERCHE(이)가 1215년 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 라 게르체-데-브레타그니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guillaume De la Guerche De Pouancé III(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Hersende de Sille- le- Guillaume(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1240년 Anne de Montmorency(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1271년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 세그e 파우아ce에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume IV DE LA GUERCHE nasceu em 1215, em La Guerche-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Guillaume De la Guerche De Pouancé III, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Hersende de Sille- le- Guillaume, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne de Montmorency aproximadamente 1240. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1271, em Pouancé, Segré, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, França, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guillaume IV DE LA GUERCHE родился в 1215 г. в местности ла гуирче-де-бретагн, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция, его отцу по имени Guillaume De la Guerche De Pouancé III было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Hersende de Sille- le- Guillaume, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne de Montmorency около 1240 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1271 г. в местности поуанкe, сегрe, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция в возрасте 56 лет.

Se casó con Anne de Montmorency aproximadamente 1240. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija.
